3300460.name: Company of Heroes 3: Stealth & Stronghold
3300460.description:
Stealth & Stronghold is a multiplayer and skirmish Battlegroup DLC featuring the British Forces Australian Defense, and Deutsches Afrikakorps Battlefield Espionage Battlegroups.

Company of Heroes 3 players who redeemed one of these Battlegroups in-game before March 25th 2025 automatically own this content as a thank you gift, and cannot purchase it here.

AUSTRALIAN DEFENSE - BRITISH FORCES

The Australian Defense Battlegroup provides the British Forces with a resolute Battlegroup, capable of repelling the fiercest assaults, while dealing devastating damage in return. 

The Australian Light Infantry section is a versatile squad capable of constructing robust field defenses, while being lethal with their marksman abilities.

Defensive Tactics allow for the construction of the Bofors AA Emplacement, and the intimidating 17 Pounder Anti-Tank Gun which will decimate the heaviest armor the enemy can throw at the line.

The Archer Tank Destroyer is another excellent anti-armor option for the British Forces. While relatively fragile, the Archer packs a serious punch, and is very mobile compared to other anti-tank options. 

BATTLEFIELD ESPIONAGE - DEUTSCHES AFRIKAKORPS 

The Battlefield Espionage Battlegroup allows the Deutsches Afrikakorps to use stealth, subterfuge, and underhanded tactics to wreak havoc on the enemy, and rout them from the field.

The 250/3 Funkpanzerwagon is a non-combat vehicle that can provide intel and concealment to your forces. It can also deploy anti-infantry, and anti-vehicle mines, making it an extremely versatile support unit.

The Goliath is a devastating ambush specialist. This unit gains camouflage when stationary and in cover, and can remotely detonate its explosive payload to eliminate swaths of infantry or enemy vehicles. 

Firestorm shells the target area with numerous incendiary shells that inflict damage over time, and slow enemy forces, making it the perfect displacement tool, or a strong option to soften enemy defenses before engaging in a ground assault.
3300460.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 韩语, 波兰语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
